failure_reason: Parallel north-star pass shipped local proof slices: branch-choice short/long feedback cells (511), receipt-to-feedback learning (255), source-aware native-route task cards preserving --source api/all, a validate.sh-preserving Form shard runner with 2.19x focused subset wall-clock improvement (22.74s to 10.39s), and a BML compiler .fkb image ratchet whose loaded executable witness runs after readback (binary verdict 29). Full-suite validation was intentionally not rerun in this slice; prior full suite cost was about 4921s.
